title: Bricksanity!
description: This Minecraft Mod adds quite an abundance of bricks of many food items, materials and even some containers.
body:
## Introducing Bricksanity!
[image will be added later when made]

### {Version 1.1.2 is the most recent version)
#### [Note: versions below 1.0.3 were uploaded for consistency]

This mod adds an aggregious amount of bricks, from singular bricks to food item bricks and even bucket bricks, there's no limit as to how many bricks will eventually exist, there may not be many now but there will bricks of even the sky and void, nothing is safe from the Brickpocalypse!
(idk, just having fun with it for now, until I think of a structure that works, this'll be the only mod here)

You ever think that most mods that have bricks don't ever add quite enough for you? do you want more bricks than is even needed? well this mod may be for you as it's updated often and has a ton of bricks, there are even plans for mixed bricks so you can have fun with that too!

Honestly though, if you feel like most mods with bricks never add enough to satisfy your hunger, this may very well be something you'd like.

#### Things to know about this mod
This mod can probably be used on servers just fine as the mechanics for it are insanely simple.

## Additions in this mod:

### Workstations
- Brickversion Station
- Brickhaunter
- Spookstation

### Items

- Soul Sprite [Basic, Aggressive, Passive, Solarjoy & Searing]

### Blocks

Some of these bricks can't be obtained yet but they will be obtainable in the future.
Also, most of these bricks have recipes, you can cook all raw bricks into cooked bricks (meat bricks) and also make Cake Bricks, and can craft planks bricks and stick bricks with the respective recipes!

I'm also planning on just adding more bricks than needed, also some of the bricks have unique shapes such as the Prismarine Brick, Stick Brick & Arrow Brick, the last 2 being skinnier than other bricks and the prismarine brick being triangular to match the block.
Pumpkin Bricks also have a unique shape, looking a bit more like a pumpkin and less boxy, even if subtle!
(same pumpkin brick shape applies to the Vilegourd bricks and other future pumpkin brick variants)
Ectoplasm Bricks also have a unique shape, being more dented at the top to represent it not being the same solid as other bricks! (this applies to all other ectoplasm brick variants)
Passive Ectoplasm Bricks & Passive Soul Biomass have different shapes to the rest of the Ectoplasm Bricks and Biomass in which differntiates them from the other variants.
Torch Bricks have a unique shape in which has the torch part extending a bit and it's a different shape from the stick bricks, this is true for the Soul Torch Brick aswell!

You can craft almost every single brick block into singular bricks and back, some bricks still don't exist yet to convert some of these bricks into single bricks and back but it'll happen in a future update!

Freezing is done with blue ice for soul sand, this is how you get the Soulfrost Brick and the next step is Soul Fire to "haunt" it into a Soul Fire Brick.
Portal Conversion is simple, just throw an item into the portal and it'll convert, but this is very specific, throw a Brick item into a nether portal to convert it into the corresponding portal brick.

Although there'll probably be more things like this in the future!
note that freezing won't always require blue ice, only soul sand and soul-related objects need blue ice to freeze.

- [Note 1: the Void, Sky and other outrageous bricks are for much later in planning, not sure how to do it currently]
- [Note 2: The Description will change occassionally, not too often though]
- [Note 3: Events will always start on the day and usually end between 1-3 weeks after]
- [Note 4: Note that sometimes, textures will change for some of the items, but this is rare to happen anyways]
